name: toggle
description: A two-state pressed <button> (aria-pressed) with shadcn variants/sizes and an optional Lucide icon. The pressed state is server-owned (data down); the click is wired via l:click. Server-first replacement for the Lit island.
docs: Copies the toggle partial to your JTE root at lievit/toggle.jte, reached as @template.lievit.toggle(...). Render `pressed` from the controller and wire `pressedAction` (l:click) to the wire action that flips it. `variant` (default|outline), `size` (sm|default|lg), optional `icon`; set `ariaLabel` for icon-only toggles. Requires the icon partial. The source is yours: edit freely.
